sentence: 这张优惠券的有效期只到本月底。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng yōu huì quàn de yǒu xiào qī zhǐ dào běn yuè dǐ.
english: This coupon's validity period only lasts until the end of this month.

sentence: 远处的雪山在阳光下闪闪发光。
pinyin: Yuǎnchù de xuěshān zài yángguāng xià shǎnshǎn fāguāng.
english: The snow-capped mountains in the distance glittered in the sunlight.

meaning: to hand it (i.e. the aforementioned item) to (sb)
sentence: 她把菜单递给了旁边的客人。
pinyin: Tā bǎ càidān dì gěi le pángbiān de kèrén.
english: She handed the menu to the guest beside her.

sentence: 洗衣机坏了，衣服只能手洗。
pinyin: Xǐyījī huài le, yīfu zhǐ néng shǒu xǐ.
english: The washing machine broke, so clothes can only be washed by hand.

sentence: 钥匙就放在桌子的抽屉里。
pinyin: Yàoshi jiù fàng zài zhuōzi de chōuti lǐ.
english: The key is in the desk drawer.
